subject: Hi!
body:
Hi Jeffrey,

I'm truly sorry the lawsuit still haunts you, but happy it was settled
today. I always wish you the very best in this world.

Always,
Cecilia
body_html:
Hi Jeffrey,

I'm truly sorry the lawsuit still haunts you, but happy it was settled today. I always wish you the very best in this world. 

Always,
Cecilia

subject: Hi!
body:
Hello, I just wanted to say Hi!  I really miss you, it's been so long. I hope that you are well Jefferey. I'm still in SF working as an Estheticain.  Things are good. I wish I could see you again someday. I think you would be really proud of me ;) Hope to hear from you.
   
   
  Nanthida
   
  (415) 424-8955

       
---------------------------------
Be a better friend, newshound, and know-it-all with Yahoo! Mobile.  Try it now.

subject: Hi!
body:
Jeffrey, dear!!!
My life in Dubai is well. I work, I play. I'm happy here because of
everything you unselfishly did for me.

*I carry your heart with me*
I carry your heart with me; I carry it in my heart
I am never without it
Anywhere I go, you go my dear
And whatever is done by only me, is your doing, my darling
I fear no fate, for you are my fate, my sweet
I want no world, for; beautiful you are my world, my true
Here is the deepest secret no one knows
Here is the root of the root and the bud of the bud
And the sky of the sky of a tree called life
Which grows higher than the soul can hope or mind can hide
It is the wonder that's keeping the stars apart
I carry your heart I carry it in my heart…

*E.E. Cummings*



-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
